summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 1353

core_modules.description: Top-level public API entry points for loading pipelines, creating blank language objects, querying glossary/error explanations, and GPU preference/requirement setup.
Core orchestration module defining the Language pipeline container, component/factory registration, pipeline execution, training hooks, and serialization behavior.
Entity linking pipeline component for KB-backed entity disambiguation.
Rule-based pattern matching primitives used independently or inside components.
Primary runtime data model types for processed text and annotations.
Training-facing API surface for example objects and training utilities.
Utility and registry module supporting dynamic loading, package detection, and configuration-driven component resolution.
Programmatic wrappers for major CLI tasks; useful as callable API without shelling out.

cli_commands.name: download
cli_commands.description: Download installed model packages compatible with spaCy version.

cli_commands.name: train
cli_commands.description: Train a pipeline from config and training data.

cli_commands.name: evaluate
cli_commands.description: Evaluate a trained pipeline on a corpus.

cli_commands.name: convert
cli_commands.description: Convert external annotation formats into spaCy training formats.

cli_commands.name: package
cli_commands.description: Build a distributable Python package for a trained pipeline.

cli_commands.name: debug-data
cli_commands.description: Inspect and validate training/dev data quality.

cli_commands.name: debug-config
cli_commands.description: Validate and inspect config resolution and overrides.

cli_commands.name: debug-model
cli_commands.description: Inspect model architecture and behavior for a config/model.

cli_commands.name: init-pipeline
cli_commands.description: Initialize and scaffold a pipeline package/setup.

cli_commands.name: validate
cli_commands.description: Check installed models and version compatibility.
